text:
Mood: Trouble concentrating on things: Freq Indicates the frequency, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has had trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television 0. Never or 1 day 
1. 2-6 days (several days) 
2. 7-11 days (half or more of the days) 
3. 12-14 days (nearly every day) CHAR 1 x
D0150H1_MOVE_SLOW_CD Mood: Moving or speaking so slowly: Pres Indicates whether, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has been moving or speaking so slowly that other
